_comment: Entity (node) schema for Narrative Structures investigations. Each entity is a person, organization, event, document, or concept.

schema.label: string — display name on the graph
schema.type: enum — person | organization | event | legislation | fund | document | concept
schema.role: string — their role in the investigation context
schema.first_seen: YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY — earliest known relevant date
schema.tags: array of strings — for filtering in Kumu

example.label: Jane Smith
example.description: City council member who voted in favor of the pension benefit increase in 2002.
